_codesee.purpose: CodeSee staleness reminder for Claude Code.
howToEnable: Option A (project-level): copy this file to .claude/settings.json in your project root.
Option B (merge): if you already have .claude/settings.json, merge the 'hooks' section below into it.
After enabling, when an agent finishes a turn, Claude Code runs the staleness check.
If features.json may be stale, the script prints a reminder; the agent reads it from the next message.
rationale: Stop hook fires once per agent turn, so the check runs at most once per turn.
The script always exits 0 and never blocks the agent. It is informational only.
We deliberately avoid PostToolUse: a single user task may run dozens of writes;
running the check after each write would be noisy and slow.
